scheme_name: Construction of Sports Infrastructure Facilities (Badminton, Table Tennis, Squash, Indoor Cricket, Basketball, Volleyball, Football, Hockey, and Swimming) in Private Sector
page_title: Construction of Sports Infrastructure Facilities (Badminton, Table Tennis, Squash, Indoor Cricket, Basketball, Volleyball, Football, Hockey, and Swimming) in Private Sector

details: The scheme “Construction of Sports Infrastructure Facilities” was launched by the Department of Sports, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide grants for the construction of sports infrastructure facilities, including Badminton, Table Tennis, Squash, Indoor Cricket, Basketball, Volleyball, Football, Hockey, and Swimming, in the private sector.
benefits: Under this scheme, 25% of the total cost of the infrastructure, or up to a maximum of ₹50.00 lakh, is provided as a grant.
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.

offline: The Department plans to provide grants to the citizens of the state for the construction of sports infrastructure. The grant will cover 25% of the total cost, up to a maximum of ₹50 lakh. These facilities can also generate employment through their operation.
Applications must be submitted offline in the prescribed format at the Directorate of Sports.
Applicants can submit their applications at any time, as per requirement.
Grants will be awarded to eligible applicants by the committee constituted for the scheme.

documents_required: Submission of documents is required in accordance with the directorate's guidelines to avail the benefits of the scheme.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: All residents of Uttarakhand can apply for the scheme.

faqs.question: What types of sports facilities are covered under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Facilities for Badminton, Table Tennis, Squash, Indoor Cricket, Basketball, Volleyball, Football, Hockey, and Swimming are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the purpose of this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme aims to promote sports development infrastructures in the state and create employment opportunities through the operation of sports facilities.

faqs.question: What is the grant amount provided under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides a grant of 25% of the total infrastructure cost, up to a maximum of ₹50 lakh.

faqs.question: Is the scheme applicable to public sector projects?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme is only applicable to sports infrastructure projects in the private sector.

faqs.question: How can one apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicants must submit an offline application in the prescribed format at the Directorate of Sports.

faqs.question: Is there a specific time period to apply?
faqs.answer: Applications can be submitted at any time, as per the applicant’s requirement.
